issue_summary: NIO doesn't recognize all encoding names that String.getBytes does, strange. At least it fails for 'UnicodeBig' on my Java 1.4 installation
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Retrieve the bytes for the given String in the encoding set for
     * this Stream.
     * @param name the string to get bytes from
     * @return the bytes as a byte array
     *
     * @since 1.3
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Retrieve the bytes for the given String in the encoding set for
     * this Stream.
     * @param name the string to get bytes from
     * @return the bytes as a byte array
     * @throws ZipException on error
     *
     * @since 1.3
     */
